creator: sakaue.mamoru-cmfho5lt@samurai.mwghennn.net
text:
I updated the patch to resolve problems still remained in cases that 
DIST_SUBDIR or file nodes contain slashes.
Also this new patch prevents wrong match in evaluating the file size from 
distinfo for URLs containing periods, plus symbols or question marks.

P.S.
The first line of "Fix:" section saying "The code creating the SIZE line of 
(temporal?) distinfo..." was wrong. Those parts are for evaluation of the 
expected correct file sizes.
